rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE THE KONSTIN FAMILY REVOCABLE TRUST TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Respondent Thomas Bomar'S Demurrer To Petitioners Second Amended Petition
rulings.Rulings: Hearing required. (1) What is the antecedent of ¿therein¿ in the 2006 will, and what is meant by the word ¿described¿? What is the significance of the fact that the trustors placed all their property into the 2009 trust? (2) Is the fact that an estate tax return was not filed sufficient to establish actionable injury? (3) Is knowledge that there was no accounting or distribution after the sale of the Mazatlan property enough to start the statute of limitations running? (4) Have Petitioners alleged ¿actual fraud¿ within the meaning of the exception in section 340.6? Any party wishing to contest the tentative ruling and argue the motion must advise opposing parties and notify the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) by 5:00 p.m. on Wednesday, August 29, 2012.
